prompt:
Decorative element for Eastern xianxia website. Tall narrow banner, 3:4 portrait orientation, single asset on solid deep ink-green background #0B211D.

Subject: A tall vertical hanging banner (挂轴) made of aged warm parchment #D8C7A2 paper hanging from a dark wood horizontal rod at the top. Two thin gold #C0A35D tassels dangle from the rod corners. The paper has frayed edges, slight aging stains, and visible paper fiber texture. A subtle dark wood bottom weight bar. The paper face is BLANK — no text, no characters, no calligraphy, no patterns — completely empty cream parchment ready for HTML text overlay.

Frame the banner centered, occupying ~80% of the vertical and 40% of the horizontal frame, with soft cast shadow behind. Realistic material rendering — aged paper, wood, gold metal.

Avoid: any text, any Chinese characters, any calligraphy, any drawings on the paper, watermarks, signatures, oversaturated colors, neon, modern style, cartoonish.
